title: The Crew Searches for a Doctor
description: On pages 9–12, the crew searches for a doctor as nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor.
scene: The Crew Searches for a Doctor. Nami falls seriously ill after Little Garden, forcing the crew to abandon the direct route to Alabasta and search for a doctor. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Gegyagya Gyagyayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayayaya

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Long ago,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Gababa Bababa!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There was a group of rowdy warriors,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Called the warrior- giant pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The two overwhelm-ingly strong captains of this pirate crew,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: were "Brogy the red ogre" and "Dorry the blue ogre."

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: mere humans could only helplessly watch by,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: As these giants wreaked havoc across the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: In the end, what stopped these rampaging giants...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Did you see our captains' catch today!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You bet! I don't think I'll ever be able to forget a catch that big!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: was a single little human girl.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Each of our captains just took down those enormously huge sea kings!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: even if we ARE giants of Elbaf, the only ones that can take care of monsters that big...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Gababababa! I gotta say, in all my years, I've never seen sea kings THAT big!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: are our captains! Isn't that right, my brothers!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You said it! They were our finest catch!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So which one,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Was bigger?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: which...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: One...?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: Brogy, look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mine clearly seems to be the bigger one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hogwash! My catch is exactly 3cm bigger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What did you say!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please stop arguing, captains!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry?
dialogue.text: By the way, Brogy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's something I can't quite seem to recall.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You know, the same goes for me too...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The Center volcano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Such things,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Well, whatever! Let's settle things once and for all today!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes! We can think things out after that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: were events of a long, long time ago.

summary: This part centers on the crew searches for a doctor, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
